name: @intentsolutionsio/gh-dash
description: GitHub PR dashboard for Claude Code. View PR status, CI/CD progress, bot comments, and merge PRs directly from your terminal.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install gh-dash\\n  or /plugin install gh-dash@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
